title: My Project - Presentation Sequence
description: Curated clip sequence for the final presentation, in narrative order.

clips.adjustments: Make the physical-to-digital contrast more pronounced

logo.description: Apply consistent logo overlay to all presentation clips

style_coherence.description: Enforce visual consistency across all selected prompts
style_coherence.style_suffix: Consistent corporate visual identity. Clean, modern, professional.
style_coherence.negative_prompt_base: text on screen, subtitles, watermark, face distortion, morphing, warping, inconsistent branding
